error_details.message: Policy: the 'log-session-summary' skill is reserved for explicit user invocation via its slash command, parsed by the host as a slash command (not as text in a prompt).

claude_response: To log a session summary, please invoke the skill on its own line: `/project-continuity:log-session-summary`
pass_reason: Hook correctly blocked the Skill call; Claude responded with a single sentence directing the user to invoke the slash command on its own line without producing summary content or attempting workarounds.
